name: .NET
meta_description: Elite, pre-vetted .NET engineers in LATAM. Axiom Cortex™ vetting, EOR compliance, and audit-ready ops. Book a strategy call today.
intro: Our developers are experts in building robust, scalable applications using the .NET framework.

pains.pain: Your large, tightly-coupled .NET application is difficult to maintain and deploy, leading to slow development cycles and high regression risk.
pains.solution: We provide experts in microservices architecture who can break down your monolith into smaller, manageable services, improving agility and scalability.
pains.kpi: Reduced deployment time by 50% and decreased bug count by 30%.

pains.pain: Your on-premise .NET infrastructure is expensive to maintain and doesn't scale efficiently with demand.
pains.solution: Our developers are proficient in migrating .NET applications to cloud platforms like Azure, optimizing for cost and performance.
pains.kpi: Lowered infrastructure costs by 40% and improved application performance by 25%.

pains.pain: Your development process is manual and error-prone, resulting in slow releases and frequent rollbacks.
pains.solution: We implement modern CI/CD pipelines for .NET applications using tools like Azure DevOps, automating the build, test, and deployment process.
pains.kpi: Increased deployment frequency by 3x and reduced rollback rate by 90%.

evaluation: Expertise in database design and optimization
technical_analysis: Our .NET developers are vetted for their ability to design and build enterprise-grade applications. We focus on their understanding of software architecture, cloud-native development, and DevOps practices.
